ads.author: Michelle Frost
ads.title: Limited Edition 250th Anniversary 8" Wind Spinner!
ads.description: Bring the ultimate 4th of July fireworks display straight to your front porch! 🇺🇸Celebrate America's historic 250th Anniversary with this stunning, vibrant 8” wind spinner. Featuring a majestic bald eagle, bold USA lettering, and a backdrop of glowing fireworks, it’s the perfect centerpiece for your patriotic summer decor!Watch the festive colors come alive as it spins in the Spring Hill breeze! Premium, weather-resistant aluminum High-definition, double-sided 1776–2026 design Heavy-duty swivel hook included for flawless spinning Perfect for your holiday cookout or as a memorable gift for a proud patriot! Want to grab yours in time for the celebrations? Comment "FIREWORKS" below or send us a DM to order today!

ads.author: Marion Zachary Allen
ads.title: Hokus Pokus Pinball Machine
ads.description: Up for sale is a Bally Hokus Pokus pinball machine in great display condition. This is a genuine electromechanical (EM) machine from the early 1970s featuring the original backglass artwork, playfield, and cabinet. Great addition to a game room, man cave, bar, or any vintage arcade collector’s setup. These old Bally machines have a charm that modern games just can’t match. Original backglass intact Playfield present and complete Coin-op cabinet with original coin doors Classic EM gameplay – no circuit boards to worry about

Cabinet appears largely complete but has been in storage and is being sold as-is, untested. ads.description: This is a project I am willing to pass on to anyone who wants to restore it. Monitor chassis recapped the tube is original with burn in on screen text and gauges only the text is noticeable during gameplay. The bad the base of the seat and cabinet need repaired or replacing so listing as a project that works and plays the switch on third gear is flaky so currently disabled in settings. No back door or monitor door on the top. No trades.
